content:
# Bubblepoint Pressure

**Summary**: The pressure at which the first bubble of gas evolves from the oil.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] evaluated several correlations to predict bubblepoint pressure for Nigerian crude oils.

## Scientific Context

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] Key parameter for material balance and reservoir management.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005]] Empirical correlation modeling.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Standing (1947) correlation outperformed other models for bubblepoint pressure with an average relative error of 5.67%. ([[2005-ademola|ADEMOLA, 2005, p. 58]])
